perturbation.original_text: 5. Show Car. Sabco agrees to provide at no expense to Prolong for its use -------- in promoting its sponsorship, five (5) free show car appearance days whereas Prolong can deem which of the Sabco show cars to use. This shall mean that Prolong may schedule any combination of Sabco's three show cars (based on availability) not to exceed a total of five show days (travel days are considered a "show date"). Sabco will provide transportation of show car and will provide an attendant to stay with the car during its display period. For any show car appearance requested by Prolong over and above the five (5) free appearances, Sabco will make available unto Prolong a show car at a discounted rate of [ * ] Dollars ($ [ * ]) per day. All travel days to and from the site of a show car appearance, as well as the actual day upon which show car is on display will be charged as a "show date". It is further understood that the parties will agree in advance upon a schedule of places and events for the show car to be displayed at such times as will not interfere with Sabco's racing schedule.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Show Car. Sabco agrees to provide at no expense to Prolong for its use -------- in promoting its sponsorship, five (5) free show car appearance days whereas Prolong can deem which of the Sabco show cars to use. This shall mean that Prolong may schedule any combination of Sabco's three show cars (based on availability) not to exceed a total of five show days (travel days are considered a "show date"). Sabco will provide transportation of show car; however, Prolong will provide an attendant to stay with the car during its display period. For any show car appearance requested by Prolong over and above the five (5) free appearances, Sabco will make available unto Prolong a show car at a discounted rate of [ * ] Dollars ($ [ * ]) per day. All travel days to and from the site of a show car appearance, as well as the actual day upon which show car is on display will be charged as a "show date". It is further understood that the parties will agree in advance upon a schedule of places and events for the show car to be displayed at such times as will not interfere with Sabco's racing schedule.
perturbation.explanation: The modification introduces an in-text contradiction by changing the responsibility for providing an attendant for the show car. Initially, Sabco was responsible, but now Prolong is responsible. This contradiction can lead to confusion and disputes regarding who is obligated to provide and pay for the attendant, affecting the show car appearances.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. Show Car. Sabco agrees to provide at no expense to Prolong for its use -------- in promoting its sponsorship, five (5) free show car appearance days whereas Prolong can deem which of the Sabco show cars to use. This shall mean that Prolong may schedule any combination of Sabco's three show cars (based on availability) not to exceed a total of five show days (travel days are considered a "show date"). Sabco will provide transportation of show car; however, Prolong will provide an attendant to stay with the car during its display period. For any show car appearance requested by Prolong over and above the five (5) free appearances, Sabco will make available unto Prolong a show car at a discounted rate of [ * ] Dollars ($ [ * ]) per day. All travel days to and from the site of a show car appearance, as well as the actual day upon which show car is on display will be charged as a "show date". It is further understood that the parties will agree in advance upon a schedule of places and events for the show car to be displayed at such times as will not interfere with Sabco's racing schedule.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself by first stating Sabco will provide an attendant and then stating Prolong will provide the attendant. This is a clear inconsistency within the same section, which leads to uncertainty about which party is responsible for providing the attendant, aligning with the definition of inconsistencies causing in-text contradictions. The contradiction affects the obligations outlined in section 5.

perturbation.original_text: 11. Insurance. Sabco shall provide at its expense and maintain throughout --------- the term of this Agreement and any option period spectator liability insurance in an amount not less than $1 million single limit coverage with respect to any liability relating to the activities of Sabco in the performance of this Agreement. Sabco shall, within 90 days of the execution of this Agreement, supply Prolong with a copy of such policy of insurance or a certificate thereof, and such policies shall be cancelable only upon 10 days written notice to Prolong.
perturbation.changed_text: 11. Insurance. Sabco shall provide at its expense and maintain throughout --------- the term of this Agreement and any option period spectator liability insurance in an amount not less than $1 million single limit coverage with respect to any liability relating to the activities of Sabco in the performance of this Agreement. Sabco shall, within 300 days of the execution of this Agreement, supply Prolong with a copy of such policy of insurance or a certificate thereof, and such policies shall be cancelable only upon 10 days written notice to Prolong.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by altering the timeframe within which Sabco must provide Prolong with proof of insurance. Initially, Sabco has 90 days, but now they have 300 days. This creates uncertainty regarding the agreed upon deadline for providing the insurance documentation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 11. Insurance. Sabco shall provide at its expense and maintain throughout --------- the term of this Agreement and any option period spectator liability insurance in an amount not less than $1 million single limit coverage with respect to any liability relating to the activities of Sabco in the performance of this Agreement. Sabco shall, within 300 days of the execution of this Agreement, supply Prolong with a copy of such policy of insurance or a certificate thereof, and such policies shall be cancelable only upon 10 days written notice to Prolong.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the deadline for Sabco to provide proof of insurance from 90 days to 300 days. The contradicted text, which is the same as the changed text, states that Sabco must provide proof within 300 days. The original text created a contradiction because it had a different deadline of 90 days. The change from 90 to 300 eliminates the contradiction and the Contradicted Text reflects the same. By making the text consistent, a contradiction is introduced into the Original text and the Contradicted Text.
